title: divide overflow is not detected for verilog 32-bit integers.

features.name: signed division INT_MIN overflow (32-bit)
features.description: Code should include a signed division where the dividend is the 32-bit minimum signed integer (0x80000000) and the divisor is -1 (0xFFFFFFFF), causing overflow

features.name: signed division INT_MIN / -1 with $signed cast
features.description: Code should include a signed division with $signed cast on both operands where the effective dividend is INT_MIN and divisor is -1
